---
title: ""
pagetitle: "The Hamstrings — Atlanta Cover Band"
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    css: home-override.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <img src="images/eddies.jpg" class="hero-bg" alt="The Hamstrings">
  <div class="home-content">
    <h2>Upcoming Dates</h2>
    <div class="home-shows">
      <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Wild+Heaven+Beer+Toco+Hills+Atlanta+GA" target="_blank" class="home-show-row">
        <span class="home-show-date">Mar 15</span>
        <span class="home-show-venue">Wild Heaven — Toco Hills</span>
        <span class="home-show-city">Atlanta, GA</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Blue+Top+Chamblee+GA" target="_blank" class="home-show-row">
        <span class="home-show-date">Apr 25</span>
        <span class="home-show-venue">Blue Top</span>
        <span class="home-show-city">Chamblee, GA</span>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="home-links">
      <a href="shows.html" class="hero-cta-outline">View Full Schedule</a>
      <a href="mailto:hamstringsatl@gmail.com" class="hero-cta-outline">Book Us for Your Next Event</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
